message:
fix: add auth and user_id to commit-track endpoint

- Add createAuth() and session check to /api/commit-track
- Add user_id to commitTracking schema
- Update CLI pretool-hook to pass auth token
- Log user_id in all commit tracking operations

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 CREATE TABLE `commit_tracking` (
 	`id` text PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
+	`user_id` text NOT NULL,
 	`session_id` text NOT NULL,
 	`repo_path` text NOT NULL,
 	`timestamp` text NOT NULL,
